name: stockyard-ipfence
description: IP-level access control for LLM proxy endpoints. Allowlist, denylist, CIDR ranges. Block unauthorized access before any request processing.

tools.name: ipfence_stats
tools.description: Get access control statistics: requests checked, blocked, allowed, unique IPs.

tools.name: ipfence_add_allow
tools.description: Add an IP or CIDR range to the allowlist.

tools.name: ipfence_add_deny
tools.description: Add an IP or CIDR range to the denylist.

tools.name: ipfence_check
tools.description: Check if a specific IP would be allowed or blocked.

tools.name: ipfence_recent
tools.description: List recent access events (allowed and blocked).

tools.name: ipfence_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the IPFence proxy is running and healthy.
